scripts.goodrick: npm --prefix "Goodrick Voice Leading Visualizer" run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort
scripts.goodrick:lan: npm --prefix "Goodrick Voice Leading Visualizer" run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173 --strictPort
scripts.goodrick:build: npm --prefix "Goodrick Voice Leading Visualizer" run build
scripts.goodrick:test: npm --prefix "Goodrick Voice Leading Visualizer" run test
scripts.build:all: npm run goodrick:build && npm run harmonic:build && npm run set:build
scripts.test:all: npm run goodrick:test && npm run harmonic:test && npm run set:test
